gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer found no issues: whitelist matches generated benchmark plan schema, minimal legacy commands-only plans still pass, and validation runs before subprocess execution.
verification: python -m pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py; python -m pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_release_bundle.py; python -m pytest -q; poetry check && poetry install --dry-run && poetry install --dry-run --extras databricks --extras test && poetry build; GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings
what_changed: Benchmark plan executor now rejects unsupported top-level benchmark plan keys and unsupported per-command keys before running commands.
why: Keeps benchmark job plans fail-closed and prevents ad hoc/debug fields from silently influencing release execution provenance.
